review_scope: final S1 diagnostic projection frames after replacing unusable near-black camera RGB frames

image_reviews.visible_evidence: Blue particles are visible above the reference line at step 0.
image_reviews.remaining_risk: Diagnostic projection only, not camera RGB.

image_reviews.visible_evidence: Blue particles are spread along the reference line at step 60.
image_reviews.remaining_risk: Particles overlap the line, so vertical structure is mostly lost.

image_reviews.visible_evidence: Blue particles remain visible along the reference line at step 120.
image_reviews.remaining_risk: Visual difference from mid frame is subtle; initial-to-mid movement is the clearer visual evidence.
